name: Fig Preserve Cake
recipeInstructions: Combine first 8 ingredients in a large mixing bowl. Add oil and eggs, beating well with an electric mixer at medium speed. Add buttermilk and vanilla, beating well. Stir in preserves and pecans. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes; remove from the pan and place on a serving plate. Pour buttermilk glaze over the cake while both are still warm. Yield: one 10-inch cake.
